summary: Completed testing of User-Generated Recipe (UGR) Module. Fixed critical route conflict between old YouTube-based recipe endpoints and new UGR module. All 18 backend tests passed. Frontend recipe creation, viewing, and navigation working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/recipes/tags - Returns 12 recipe tags with translations (en/hi/mr)
GET /api/recipes/units - Returns 10 unit options
GET /api/recipes/suggest-ingredients - Requires auth (401 without token)
GET /api/recipes/suggest-ingredients - Returns suggestions with auth
GET /api/recipes/suggest-ingredients - Short query (<2 chars) returns empty
GET /api/recipes - Returns household recipes list
GET /api/recipes/community - Returns published community recipes
POST /api/recipes - Creates recipe with auto-translation of ingredients
POST /api/recipes - Calculates stock status for ingredients
GET /api/recipes/{id} - Returns recipe details with stock status
GET /api/recipes/{id} - Returns 404 for non-existent recipe
PUT /api/recipes/{id} - Updates recipe and persists changes
DELETE /api/recipes/{id} - Deletes recipe successfully
POST /api/recipes/{id}/like - Increments likes for published recipes
POST /api/recipes/{id}/add-missing-to-shopping - Adds missing items to shopping list
GET /api/recipes?tag=xxx - Filters recipes by tag
GET /api/recipes?search=xxx - Searches recipes by title/ingredients
Frontend: Bottom navigation shows 'Recipes' link
Frontend: Navigation to /recipes works
Frontend: Recipe creator form opens and accepts input
Frontend: Recipe creation saves to database
Frontend: Recipe detail view shows all information
Frontend: Stock status badge displays correctly
Frontend: Community tab shows empty state
Frontend: Search functionality works
Frontend: Translations for 'recipes' label present (en/hi/mr)

bugs_fixed.issue: Route conflict between old /api/recipes endpoints and new UGR module
bugs_fixed.root_cause: Old YouTube-based recipe endpoints in server.py (lines 2007-2060) were shadowing new recipe router endpoints

critical_code_review_comments: Route conflict was causing 422 validation errors when creating recipes via frontend
Old endpoints expected youtube_url and string[] ingredients, new endpoints expect RecipeCreate model
Fix applied: Renamed old endpoints to /api/youtube-recipes to avoid conflict
seed_data_creation: Created test user recipe_tester@test.com with household 'Test Recipe Household'. Created test recipes: 'Test Dal Makhani', 'UI Test Recipe'
context_for_next_testing_agent: UGR module fully tested. Key endpoints: GET/POST /api/recipes, GET /api/recipes/tags, GET /api/recipes/units, GET /api/recipes/suggest-ingredients, GET /api/recipes/community, POST /api/recipes/{id}/like, POST /api/recipes/{id}/add-missing-to-shopping. Old YouTube recipe endpoints moved to /api/youtube-recipes. Test user: recipe_tester@test.com / TestPass123!

recipe_tags_api.status: Working - returns 12 tags with en/hi/mr translations

ingredient_suggestions.status: Working - requires auth, returns inventory matches

recipe_crud.status: Working - full CRUD with auto-translation and stock status

add_to_shopping.status: Working - adds missing ingredients to shopping list

recipes_page.status: Working - shows household recipes, community tab, search, filters

recipe_creator.status: Working - form accepts all fields, saves to database

recipe_detail.status: Working - shows ingredients, instructions, stock status
